extra_lines: L33 ALWAYS-CLOTHED HARD: Yuna stays fully clothed at every tier. No nudity. NASA flight suit (tiers 2-5) and cosmic peak bodysuit (tier 6) preserve full coverage of breasts / groin / glutes. Garments may strain and stress but never expose.

L17 YUNA CANONICAL ANCHOR: Every face-visible panel shows Yuna with short cropped black hair (NOT twin buns, NOT long hair — short crop length, fringe just above eyebrows), brown eyes, fair-to-medium Japanese complexion, age 32, strikingly beautiful, vogue-cover glamour, defined cheekbones, clear skin with subsurface scattering. Zero face drift across panels.

L21 REFERENCE EXCLUSION: Attached face card / body-tier lineup / multi-angle pack / env ref / tier-6 reinforcement are guidance only. Never render them as physical scene objects (no inset photos, no posters, no proportion stat overlays, no progress bars).

L22 HAIR STATE EXPLICIT: Every face-visible panel must explicitly name the hair: 'short cropped black hair, just-above-ear length, slightly tousled'. From tier 4 onward add: 'hair lifts subtly with cosmic energy currents'. No twin buns. No long hair. No ponytail.

L23 ENV VERBAL ANCHOR (ISS cupola): When env ref dropped, anchor with: International Space Station observation cupola, seven angled windows with Earth visible curving below, control panels with backlit indicators, floating clipboards and pens drifting in zero-g, padded handholds along the bulkhead, distant ISS modules through one window, deep-space blackness in the others.

L24 ACCESSORY SUPPRESSION: NASA mission patch (HOSHINO name tag, JAXA flag patch on shoulder) is canonical for tiers 2-5. At tier 6 the cosmic bodysuit is patch-free. Suppress hallucinated jewelry / watches / rings / earrings when wrists, neck, ears, or fingers are in frame.

L29 TIER REINFORCEMENT (tier-6 auto-attach): Panels 9-10 auto-attach the canonical tier-6 reinforcement ref from skills/comic-production/references/peak-body-scale/tier-6/. Render figure-scale at or above the ref.

PHOTOREAL CGI / DAZ3D STYLE: All bodies, costumes, skin, hair, ISS cupola, cosmic energy render as photoreal DAZ3D / Iray-style CGI with ray-traced subsurface scattering, PBR materials, 8K textures. Cosmic energy = volumetric iridescent purple-cyan-gold nebula glow with bloom and lens flares. 2D scope is the captions only (panels 4, 7, 10).

BEAUTY ANCHORING: Yuna renders strikingly beautiful in every panel — vogue-cover glamour Japanese beauty, symmetric features, glamour lighting on the face. Muscle scale at tier 6 does NOT degrade facial beauty.
CHEST OVERSIZE COMPENSATION: At every tier 3 onward, prompt for chest size LARGER than the lineup figure suggests for that tier. Bust scales WITH muscle at every tier (not just one or the other).
AUTONOMOUS VARIANT SELECTION (autopilot): Pick winning variants without asking. Surface only locked outputs and HARD-fail retries.
DIALOGUE MODE MINIMAL — captions appear ONLY on panels 4, 7, 10 as predefined internal-thought yellow rounded-rectangle caption boxes (L19 flat 2D overlay). Other 7 panels carry no text.
TONE — AWE AND WONDER: Yuna does not fear the transformation. Expressions across the arc move from focused → curious → amazed → reverent → triumphant. No fear, no panic, no resistance.
